name: Animal Arena
author: Poki
description: Is a bear stronger than rhino? And is a dragon stronger than a rabbit? Find out in Animal Arena! In this local multiplayer battle game you and up to 3 friends each pick an animal and fight it out in 16 unique arenas. The rules are simple; if you jump on another animals head, you gain a point. There's two different game modes to choose from: In Timed Mode, each player will have to try and score as many points before the clock runs out. Only the fastest will win! In Lives Mode, each player gets a set amount of lives. Once all your lives are up, it's game over! Last animal standing wins... There are 120 unique animals to discover! Can you collect them all and become the champion of Animal Arena? How to play Animal Arena? Every player uses one button on the keyboard to control their animal! Player 1: Uses spacebar or W! Player 2: Uses C! Player 3: Uses N! Player 4: Uses P! Who created Animal Arena Animal Arena is created by Adventure Islands. Play their other games on Poki: Heart Star , Poor Bunny , Total Party Kill and Tightrope Theatre How can I play Animal Arena for free? You can play Animal Arena for free on Poki. Can I play Animal Arena on mobile devices and desktop? Animal Arena can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Animal Arena with my friend? Yes! Animal Arena is a multiplayer game so you can play locally with your friends!
